meta.title: Dragin — The Edge of Your Screen, Evolved
meta.description: Zero cloud. Infinite power. A suite of premium desktop tools that intelligently process files directly on your machine.

hero.title:
Zero cloud.
Infinite power.
hero.subtitle: Meet Dragin. A suite of beautiful, localized tools that live at the edge of your screen. No internet required. Drag, drop, done.

local.title: Absolute Privacy.
local.desc: Everything happens on-device. No uploads. No servers. Your data never leaves your machine.

instant.title: Infinite Speed.
instant.desc: No waiting for uploads. Tools materialize at the edge of your screen and process instantly.

smart.title: Neural Engines.
smart.desc: Powered by advanced local AI. Upscale, remove backgrounds, and extract text without an internet connection.

flow.name: Dragin Flow
flow.description: A dynamic side-dock packed with 12 intelligent file processing tools. Hover to reveal, drag to transform. It's that simple.

shelf.name: Dragin Shelf
shelf.description: Zero-configuration file sharing across your LAN. Drop a file, and it instantly shatters the boundary between your devices.

glimpse.name: Dragin Glimpse
glimpse.description: Browse, filter, and organize visual assets from linked folders without moving a single file. An explorer built for creatives.

cta.title: Ready to evolve?
cta.subtitle: Experience the next generation of desktop tools. Free and local forever.

footer.copyright: © 2026 Dragin. Designed with purpose. Runs entirely on your machine.

hero.title: Dragin Flow. Magic at the edge.
hero.subtitle: An intelligent suite of 12 powerful tools embedded seamlessly into your workflow. Drag any file, watch the magic unfold.

dragDrop.title: Intuitive Flow
dragDrop.desc: Bypass menus entirely. Drag a file onto the dock and the result is immediate.

alwaysOn.title: Always Ready
alwaysOn.desc: Invisible until you need it. Hover at the screen edge to summon unparalleled power.

localAI.title: Unleashed AI
localAI.desc: Harness the raw computational power of your own silicon. No servers. No limits.

hero.title: Dragin Shelf. Teleportation, real.
hero.subtitle: The ultimate LAN sharing experience. Forget accounts, pairing, and the internet. Just drop and share.

step1.title: Launch
step1.desc: Open Shelf on the devices you wish to bridge.

step2.title: Drop
step2.desc: Drag any file onto the window. Size doesn't matter.

step3.title: Materialize
step3.desc: Files instantly appear across your entire local network.

zeroConfig.title: Zero Friction
zeroConfig.desc: No pairing codes. No accounts. Total device discovery autonomy.

lanOnly.title: Airtight Network
lanOnly.desc: 100% peer-to-peer over your local network. True privacy.

crossPlatform.title: Universal Bridge
crossPlatform.desc: Windows available now. The rest of your ecosystem is coming.

hero.title: Dragin Glimpse. Total asset clarity.
hero.subtitle: A remarkably intelligent file explorer that unifies your scattered assets without moving them. Absolute clarity for creatives.

linked.title: Linked Folders
linked.desc: Track assets across your entire disk seamlessly.

filters.title: Cascade Filters
filters.desc: Instantly drill down by type, color, dimensions, and more.

thumbnails.title: Universal Parsing
thumbnails.desc: Native previews for PSD, AI, and raw documents.
